overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open prairie grassland with mountains in the distance. A horse-drawn carriage passes by from the opposite direction around the 20-second mark, and the character continues toward a junction near wooden ranch buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with distant ranch buildings

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the dirt trail through grassland with mountains ahead

entered.detail: worn dirt path cutting through the prairie grass with visible footprints
rolling green grass fields extending to the horizon on both sides of the trail
rocky mountain peaks with forested slopes forming the distant backdrop
rustic wooden building with sloped roof situated in the meadow
low green shrubs and vegetation scattered along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy walking along a dirt trail through expansive prairie grassland. The landscape features rolling green hills with a prominent mountain range in the distance and a wooden ranch house visible to the right. The sky is partly cloudy with bright midday sun illuminating the scene.

events.description: horse-drawn wagon appears in the distance approaching from ahead on the trail
wagon passes by on the right side of the trail, moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the horse-drawn wagon approaches and passes by

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon moving toward the camera along the trail
driver sitting on the wagon seat holding reins as it passes

entered.detail: wooden wagon with two horses and a driver approaching on the trail

segments.scene_description: As the cowboy continues walking, a horse-drawn wagon appears in the distance and approaches along the trail. The wagon passes by on the right side, revealing the driver holding the reins. The wooden ranch house shifts from the right toward the center of the frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail approaching a junction near ranch buildings

events.description: character slows slightly and turns toward the right fork at the trail junction

agents.ego_description: walking toward the ranch buildings and approaching a fork in the dirt trail

entered.detail: junction where the dirt trail splits into two paths ahead
wooden fence post marking the trail boundary
flock of birds flying across the sky above the mountains

segments.scene_description: After the wagon passes, the cowboy continues along the widening trail which now shows prominent wagon wheel tracks. The wooden ranch house recedes toward the left as the camera approaches a trail junction. Wooden fence posts appear along the left side, and birds fly overhead against the partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail through an expansive prairie that transitions from an open landscape into a ranch junction. It begins by following a cowboy walking through rolling green hills under a bright midday sun, with a distant mountain range and a wooden ranch house visible to the right. As the cowboy advances, a horse-drawn wagon appears and passes by on the right, causing the ranch house to shift toward the center of the frame. The scene then opens up as the trail widens to reveal deep wagon wheel tracks, while the ranch house recedes to the left. Finally, the camera approaches a trail junction lined with wooden fence posts as birds fly overhead against the partly cloudy sky.
